name: openclaw-famulor
description: Famulor.io OpenClaw Plugin - KI-Telefonassistenten erstellen und verwalten

scripts.test:api: node -e "import('./dist/api-client.js').then(m => { const c = new m.FamulorApiClient({apiKey: process.env.FAMULOR_API_KEY}); return c.getLanguages(); }).then(r => console.log(JSON.stringify(r, null, 2)))"
